attacking_style: Specialist in late, explosive attacks inside the final 2km on summit finishes, launching from either breakaways or select GC groups when larger names are present and watching each other.
team_tactics: Operates with significant autonomy, capitalizing on breakaway freedom or situations where his team role is minimal and he can exploit tactical standoffs among favorites.
terrain_preference: Summit finishes with steep gradients in the final 1-2km where explosive accelerations can create immediate gaps; thrives when GC contenders are present to neutralize each other.
vulnerability: Exposed when GC teams set sustained tempo that eliminates breakaways early; requires either breakaway freedom or tactical confusion among favorites to execute winning moves.
key_patterns: Attacks inside final 2km on summit finishes (both observations show <2km to go)
Exploits presence of GC favorites who mark each other rather than chase outsiders (both wins)
Wins from different race situations: breakaway and select GC group (tactical versatility demonstrated)
form_trajectory: unknown: only 2021 data available, insufficient recent observations to assess current trajectory
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 20
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 20
